title: Optimized Trims
description: Uses composite item models to remove the need of different models for each trim color
body:
# Info
This resourcepack is made for datapack and resourcepack creators who work with trims. It makes it so you don't have to have a model for every item trim color. This uses 1.21.4+ composite item models in order to achieve this.

**This resourcepack does nothing on its own (expect for the no z fighting version)**
### Versions
There are 2 different versions of this pack. There is a no z fighting one that adds a texture when there is a trim to remove z fighting. The other one is just the normal one that doesn't fix this.
